bullets.text: Built a bottom-up / parameterized TAM and demand model to support GTM planning and investment memos.
Delivered executive-style readouts connecting analysis to pricing, positioning, rollout sequencing, and growth hypotheses to align stakeholders on next steps.
Analyzed business health and unit economics metrics including margins, operating margin, and inventory turnover to support decision-making.
Conducted competitive intelligence and customer research using public sources, surveys, and interviews to identify adoption and pricing drivers.
Translated retention and feature-adoption insights into product requirements and reframed technical advanced-filter parameters into outcome-oriented labels to reduce user confusion.
Segmented cohorts by customer persona and workflow to identify advanced filter adoption as a behavioral driver of churn in China.
Contributed to a +3% improvement in China D1 retention after advanced filtering UX changes.
Defined D1/D7 retention and feature-adoption KPIs, built recurring monitoring dashboards, and provided ongoing stakeholder visibility into cohort health.
Set outreach targets, tracked sub-team performance in Excel, and supported execution planning across the team.
Led a 15-member team delivering networking and career events for 200+ attendees.
Negotiated partnerships to secure $8,000 in ticket sales and sponsorship.
Organized an Amazon company tour and hosted 80+ students.

leadership_sections.title: Head of Career and Community Development

bullets.text: Built a canonical account/entity mapping layer across CRM and billing systems to support reliable joins and funnel analysis.
Distinguished involuntary and voluntary churn to support targeted operational follow-up and reporting.
Modeled KPI-ready marts for MRR, churn, retention, activation, pipeline conversion, and time-to-close.
Standardized and cleaned a 70K+ record dataset and documented assumptions for repeatable analysis.
Applied non-parametric tests and regression/PCA methods to evaluate rating drivers and potential bias.
Built regression models with PCA and achieved R² = 0.72.

rationale: Used section density targets from Benny's original resume silhouette instead of shrinking type.
Selected 2 experience roles, 2 projects, and 1 leadership sections.
Supported JD keywords incorporated through truthful selection: requirements, workflow, planning, stakeholders, support.
summary: Analytical operator with experience translating market, product, and operational data into KPI definitions, growth insights, and stakeholder-ready recommendations with emphasis on requirements, workflow, planning.
